items.text: numberServicesTrue counts true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS
items.fragment: numberServicesTrue counts true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS
items.requirement_fragment: numberServicesTrue counts true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS

items.text: If inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) is sufficient, then outDec = ACAS
items.fragment: If inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) is sufficient, then outDec = ACAS
items.requirement_fragment: If inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) is sufficient, then outDec = ACAS

items.text: If inpGCASImpact <= inpACASImpact or (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) is insufficient, then outDec = GCAS
items.fragment: If inpGCASImpact <= inpACASImpact or (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) is insufficient, then outDec = GCAS

items.text: If numberServicesTrue >= 2, then outDec is set to the dynamic decision result

items.requirement_fragment: If numberServicesTrue >= 2, then outDec is set to the dynamic decision result

items.text: If numberServicesTrue < 2, then outDec defaults to a static priority-based value
